# PRICING

![](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/60180051d5e6a55235d91072/f6c3b9d7-c3e7-44f2-ab68-7828586bff7d/CRT+LOGO.png)

- ### Tubes






Open Tube **$33** Closed Tube **$35** Head Rest Tube **$40\. Please remember children 12 and under must have a closed tube**



\*TUBULAR TUESDAYS ( **$22** open or closed tube)



Trip Duration 3-4 hours depending on water level and river flow



Paddles ($5) and straps ($2) available for rent during checkout. **Paddles highly recommended 1 per 3 people**



_$2 fee required by parks per tube rented (included on prices above)_



Cooler Tubes $ **27 (limited availability)**

- ### Group Pricing






15-24 people **$27**/person



25-34 people **$25**/person



35+ people **$23**/Person



\*same price for closed and open for group rates



\*$2 fee required by parks per tube rented

- ### Season Passes






Season Passes available for **$95**



Price includes Unlimited Tubing for the 2026 Season. Also includes a pair of Chattahoochee River Tubing sunglasses and a waterproof case


![](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/60180051d5e6a55235d91072/649f62cb-1506-4b3e-84a7-cd1a20f1217f/Screenshot+2025-07-22+at+5.55.05%E2%80%AFPM.png)

**Please be aware that booking online does not reserve your place in line and we HIGHLY suggest arriving 20 minutes before you time slot unless the important announcements section of our homepage says otherwise**
